head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland to Waitomo
Mostly cloudy, with isolated showers north of Auckland City, spreading elsewhere for a time this afternoon.
Coromandel Peninsula, Bay of Plenty, and the central high country
Mostly cloudy with a few showers.
Taranaki to Wellington
Partly cloudy. Occasional rain developing about the ranges this afternoon, spreading to Wellington by evening.
Gisborne, Hawke's Bay and Wairarapa
High cloud increasing, with some light rain for southern Wairarapa tonight.
Nelson, Marlborough and Buller
A few showers turning to rain this morning, with heavy falls from around midday.
Canterbury, Otago and Southland
Scattered rain spreading throughout this morning, then clearing during the afternoon and evening.
Grey to Fiordland
Rain with heavy falls and possible thunderstorms, gradually easing in the south this evening.
Chatham Islands
Cloudy this morning with a possible light shower, then becoming mainly fine.
Friday

North Island: Showers, turning to rain in the west late evening. Northerlies rising to gale in exposed places.
South Island: Periods of rain in the north and west, with heavy falls, and occasional rain spreading elsewhere. Northwest gales in exposed places.
Saturday

North Island: Rain clearing early then a few showers in the west, and becoming fine in the east. Gale northwesterlies in exposed places, easing.
South Island: Rain in the west and south, easing to few showers in the morning. Mainly fine elsewhere. Gale northwesterlies easing.
Sunday

North Island: Fine spells and isolated showers in the west and north. A few showers developing in the south later.
South Island: Showers in the west and south. Mainly fine at first elsewhere, but showers spreading north later.
Chatham Islands
Cloudy periods and the odd shower, turning to rain for a time Saturday. Strong northerlies, easing late Saturday.
Issued: 11:30pm Wednesday 6 May 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
